title: rubus rubrisetulosus
intro: Rubus rubrisetulosus, also known as the red-bristled raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to China. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus rubrisetulosus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as improving cardiovascular health and immune function. The herbal preparations of Rubus rubrisetulosus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and skin problems.
